text:
Aguilor is a café in Doli City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 20, Chapter 201 

Overview

The café serves a variety of food, sweets, and beverages, and receives a decent number of customers. And its waitresses wear a pink maid dress. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Soon after Knuckle's open challenge aimed at Gon and Killua, the two discuss the matter in the cafe. 

References

 

fr:Aguilor
